# Copilot Instructions

<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

## Project Overview
This is a Next.js project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and ESLint configuration. The project uses the App Router and has a src directory structure.

## Code Style and Preferences
- Use TypeScript for all new components and pages
- Use Tailwind CSS for styling
- Follow React and Next.js best practices
- Use functional components with hooks
- Prefer arrow functions for component definitions
- Use proper TypeScript types and interfaces
- Follow ESLint rules and maintain code quality

## File Structure
- Components should be placed in `src/components/`
- Pages use the App Router in `src/app/`
- Utilities and helpers go in `src/lib/`
- Types and interfaces in `src/types/`

## Development Guidelines
- Write clean, readable, and maintainable code
- Use proper error handling
- Add appropriate comments for complex logic
- Follow accessibility best practices
- Optimize for performance when possible
